floor_history.headline: Recon: vT40 floor=4 reproduces on main (canonical C, 178/179); the handoff's active lever (rich-pass permuter workspace + triage + all session-10 tooling) was LOST with the bb2-work-marion worktree an

Structural axis for the pair-swap measured CLOSED: 26 forms swept (geometry/decl-order/type/staging), floor stays 4; NEW mechanism fact — shift-merged-into-load geometry moves the sched2 tie WITHOUT t

frontier.hypothesis: The unknown original source shape is findable by the rebuilt rich-pass permuter campaign on the vT40 base (unchanged from s1 — still the ONE active lever, now with the hand-structural space fully banked as closed)

frontier.hypothesis: Pair-swap via hand-derived C is CLOSED (do not re-attempt): any closure must arrive as a sampler find whose window shows (sll v0; addu; sll a0) with t0-first seats

frontier.next_probe: none by hand — vet sampler finds only; banked rejected forms name the dead families

frontier.next_probe: no independent probe — adiff.py the tail region (insn 149) of any sub-200 sampler find before scoring the rest

judge_constraints: FINAL owner ruling 2026-07-06 (do-while-zero-exception.md): do-while(0) sanctioned for ANY codegen effect incl. RA weighting, mandatory inline FAKE annotation; nested wraps additionally need a single-level-insufficient justification. The interim not-sanctioned ruling is superseded. STILL FORBIDDEN: regfix, register pins, __asm__ injection, semantic-lie C (cross-symbol derivation, per 2026-07-05).

candidate.c = vT40 (masked 4, verified): layer-1 review round-3 verdict was PASS-except-one — the NESTED wrap at line ~111 was held NEEDS_USER at the time; under the FINAL ruling it needs a documented single-level-insufficient justification (vT44 battery was staged to eliminate it entirely — check evidence). The Judge must independently verify that justification or its elimination.

Residual gap is 2 root-caused items (see evidence: pair-swap @56/57 coupled fixed point — sched2 LUID tie + qty_compare 5.33v5.33 tie; wrap toolbox measured DEAD for this pair). Do NOT re-derive the 140-ordering sweep, the 9-variant topology sweep, or the cc1psx parity test — all closed negative. Active lever at handoff: rich-pass permuter on the vT40 base.
